{
  "contents": "/**\n * Git Commit Link Module\n * Manages Git hooks to automatically append AI conversation links to commit messages.\n * \n * Features:\n * - Installs prepare-commit-msg hook in repositories\n * - Tracks current session via temporary file for IPC with hook script\n * - Validates login status before enabling\n * - Generates URLs based on debug/production configuration\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\n\nexport interface SessionInfo {\n    sessionId: string;\n    url: string;\n    timestamp: number;\n}\n\nconst HOOK_SCRIPT_NAME = 'prepare-commit-msg';\nconst CONFIG_DIR_NAME = 'config';\nconst SESSION_FILE_NAME = 'current-session.json';\n\n// Session expiry time: 30 minutes\nconst SESSION_EXPIRY_MS = 30 * 60 * 1000;\n\n/**\n * Get the path to the session config directory for a workspace\n * Path: <workspace>/.llm-chat-history/config/\n */\nexport function getConfigDir(workspacePath: string): string {\n    return path.join(workspacePath, '.llm-chat-history', CONFIG_DIR_NAME);\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the path to the session info file for a workspace\n * Path: <workspace>/.llm-chat-history/config/current-session.json\n */\nexport function getSessionFilePath(workspacePath: string): string {\n    return path.join(getConfigDir(workspacePath), SESSION_FILE_NAME);\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the dashboard URL based on configuration\n */\nexport function getDashboardUrl(sessionId: string): string {\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n    \n    let baseUrl = 'https://llm-chat-history.com';\n    \n    if (debugMode) {\n        const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n        if (debugUrl) {\n            baseUrl = debugUrl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Use standard dashboard URL format\n    return `${baseUrl}/dashboard?session=${sessionId}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the server base URL\n */\nexport function getServerBaseUrl(): string {\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n    \n    if (debugMode) {\n        const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n        if (debugUrl) {\n            return debugUrl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return 'https://llm-chat-history.com';\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if Git commit link feature is enabled\n */\nexport function isGitCommitLinkEnabled(): boolean {\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    return config.get<boolean>('gitCommit.linkEnabled', false);\n}\n\n/**\n * Write current session info to file for IPC with Git hook\n * Writes to: <workspacePath>/.llm-chat-history/config/current-session.json\n */\nexport function writeSessionInfo(sessionId: string, workspacePath: string): void {\n    const sessionInfo: SessionInfo = {\n        sessionId,\n        url: getDashboardUrl(sessionId),\n        timestamp: Date.now()\n    };\n    \n    try {\n        const configDir = getConfigDir(workspacePath);\n        const filePath = getSessionFilePath(workspacePath);\n        \n        // Ensure config directory exists\n        if (!fs.existsSync(configDir)) {\n            fs.mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true });\n        }\n        \n        fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(sessionInfo, null, 2), 'utf8');\n        console.log('[GitCommitLink] Session info written:', sessionId, 'at', filePath);\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[GitCommitLink] Failed to write session info:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Read current session info from file\n */\nexport function readSessionInfo(workspacePath: string): SessionInfo | null {\n    try {\n        const filePath = getSessionFilePath(workspacePath);\n        if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        \n        const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8');\n        const info = JSON.parse(content) as SessionInfo;\n        \n        // Check if session is expired\n        if (Date.now() - info.timestamp > SESSION_EXPIRY_MS) {\n            console.log('[GitCommitLink] Session expired, clearing');\n            clearSessionInfo(workspacePath);\n            return null;\n        }\n        \n        return info;\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[GitCommitLink] Failed to read session info:', error);\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Clear session info file\n */\nexport function clearSessionInfo(workspacePath: string): void {\n    try {\n        const filePath = getSessionFilePath(workspacePath);\n        if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {\n            fs.unlinkSync(filePath);\n            console.log('[GitCommitLink] Session info cleared');\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[GitCommitLink] Failed to clear session info:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate the Git hook script content\n * The hook reads session info from the project's .llm-chat-history/config/current-session.json\n */\nfunction generateHookScript(): string {\n    // Session file is now relative to the repo root\n    const sessionFileRelPath = `.llm-chat-history/${CONFIG_DIR_NAME}/${SESSION_FILE_NAME}`;\n    \n    return `#!/bin/bash\n# LLM Chat History - Auto-link AI conversations to commits\n# This hook appends AI conversation links to commit messages\n# Installed by: LLM Chat History VS Code Extension\n# WARNING: Do not edit manually. Re-enable the feature in VS Code settings to update.\n\nCOMMIT_MSG_FILE=\"$1\"\nCOMMIT_SOURCE=\"$2\"\n\n# Only process for regular commits (not merge, squash, etc.)\nif [ \"$COMMIT_SOURCE\" = \"merge\" ] || [ \"$COMMIT_SOURCE\" = \"squash\" ]; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Get the repository root\nREPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)\nif [ -z \"$REPO_ROOT\" ]; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Session file is in the project's .llm-chat-history/config/ directory\nSESSION_FILE=\"$REPO_ROOT/${sessionFileRelPath}\"\n\n# Check if session file exists\nif [ ! -f \"$SESSION_FILE\" ]; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Read session info (using basic shell parsing to avoid jq dependency)\nSESSION_DATA=$(cat \"$SESSION_FILE\")\n\n# Extract values using grep and sed\nSESSION_URL=$(echo \"$SESSION_DATA\" | grep -o '\"url\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"[^\"]*\"' | sed 's/\"url\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"\\\\([^\"]*\\\\)\"/\\\\1/')\nTIMESTAMP=$(echo \"$SESSION_DATA\" | grep -o '\"timestamp\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*' | sed 's/\"timestamp\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*//')\n\n# Validate data\nif [ -z \"$SESSION_URL\" ] || [ -z \"$TIMESTAMP\" ]; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Check if session is not too old (30 minutes = 1800000 ms)\nCURRENT_TIME=$(($(date +%s) * 1000))\nTIME_DIFF=$((CURRENT_TIME - TIMESTAMP))\nif [ $TIME_DIFF -gt 1800000 ]; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Check if link already exists in commit message (avoid duplicates)\nif grep -q \"🤖 AI:\" \"$COMMIT_MSG_FILE\" 2>/dev/null; then\n    exit 0\nfi\n\n# Append AI link to commit message\necho \"\" >> \"$COMMIT_MSG_FILE\"\necho \"🤖 AI: $SESSION_URL\" >> \"$COMMIT_MSG_FILE\"\n\nexit 0\n`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the path to the Git hooks directory for a repository\n */\nfunction getHooksDir(repoPath: string): string {\n    return path.join(repoPath, '.git', 'hooks');\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if hook is installed in a repository\n */\nexport function isHookInstalled(repoPath: string): boolean {\n    const hookPath = path.join(getHooksDir(repoPath), HOOK_SCRIPT_NAME);\n    \n    if (!fs.existsSync(hookPath)) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    try {\n        const content = fs.readFileSync(hookPath, 'utf8');\n        return content.includes('LLM Chat History');\n    } catch {\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Install the Git hook in a repository\n */\nexport async function installHook(repoPath: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; message: string }> {\n    const hooksDir = getHooksDir(repoPath);\n    const hookPath = path.join(hooksDir, HOOK_SCRIPT_NAME);\n    \n    try {\n        // Check if .git directory exists\n        const gitDir = path.join(repoPath, '.git');\n        if (!fs.existsSync(gitDir)) {\n            return { \n                success: false, \n                message: 'Not a git repository' \n            };\n        }\n        \n        // Create hooks directory if it doesn't exist\n        if (!fs.existsSync(hooksDir)) {\n            fs.mkdirSync(hooksDir, { recursive: true });\n        }\n        \n        // Check for existing hook\n        if (fs.existsSync(hookPath)) {\n            const existingContent = fs.readFileSync(hookPath, 'utf8');\n            \n            if (existingContent.includes('LLM Chat History')) {\n                // Our hook, update it\n                fs.writeFileSync(hookPath, generateHookScript(), 'utf8');\n                fs.chmodSync(hookPath, '755');\n                return { \n                    success: true, \n                    message: 'Hook updated' \n                };\n            } else {\n                // Different hook exists, warn user\n                return { \n                    success: false, \n                    message: `A different ${HOOK_SCRIPT_NAME} hook already exists. Please backup and remove it first.`\n                };\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // Install new hook\n        fs.writeFileSync(hookPath, generateHookScript(), 'utf8');\n        fs.chmodSync(hookPath, '755');\n        \n        console.log('[GitCommitLink] Hook installed at:', hookPath);\n        return { \n            success: true, \n            message: 'Hook installed successfully' \n        };\n    } catch (error) {\n        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n        console.error('[GitCommitLink] Failed to install hook:', error);\n        return { \n            success: false, \n            message: `Failed to install hook: ${errorMsg}` \n        };\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Uninstall the Git hook from a repository\n */\nexport function uninstallHook(repoPath: string): { success: boolean; message: string } {\n    const hookPath = path.join(getHooksDir(repoPath), HOOK_SCRIPT_NAME);\n    \n    try {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(hookPath)) {\n            return { \n                success: true, \n                message: 'Hook not found (already uninstalled)' \n            };\n        }\n        \n        const content = fs.readFileSync(hookPath, 'utf8');\n        if (!content.includes('LLM Chat History')) {\n            return { \n                success: false, \n                message: 'Cannot uninstall: hook was not installed by this extension' \n            };\n        }\n        \n        fs.unlinkSync(hookPath);\n        console.log('[GitCommitLink] Hook uninstalled from:', hookPath);\n        \n        return { \n            success: true, \n            message: 'Hook uninstalled successfully' \n        };\n    } catch (error) {\n        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n        console.error('[GitCommitLink] Failed to uninstall hook:', error);\n        return { \n            success: false, \n            message: `Failed to uninstall hook: ${errorMsg}` \n        };\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Git Commit Link Manager\n * Handles the lifecycle of commit linking feature\n */\nexport class GitCommitLinkManager implements vscode.Disposable {\n    private disposables: vscode.Disposable[] = [];\n    private currentSessionId?: string;\n    private currentWorkspacePath?: string;\n    private sessionUpdateInterval?: NodeJS.Timeout;\n    private installedRepos: Set<string> = new Set();\n    \n    constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}\n    \n    /**\n     * Initialize the manager\n     */\n    async init(): Promise<void> {\n        // Watch for configuration changes\n        this.disposables.push(\n            vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(async (e) => {\n                if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.gitCommit.linkEnabled')) {\n                    await this.handleConfigChange();\n                }\n            })\n        );\n        \n        // Check initial state\n        await this.handleConfigChange();\n        \n        console.log('[GitCommitLinkManager] Initialized');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Handle configuration change for the feature toggle\n     */\n    private async handleConfigChange(): Promise<void> {\n        const enabled = isGitCommitLinkEnabled();\n        \n        if (enabled) {\n            // Validate login\n            const isLoggedIn = this.checkLogin();\n            if (!isLoggedIn) {\n                // Show error and disable\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Git Commit Link requires login. Please login first.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Disable Feature'\n                ).then(async selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudLogin');\n                    } else if (selection === 'Disable Feature') {\n                        await this.disableFeature();\n                    }\n                });\n                \n                // Revert setting\n                await this.disableFeature();\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            // Install hooks for all open workspaces\n            await this.installHooksForWorkspaces();\n            \n            // Start session tracking\n            this.startSessionTracking();\n            \n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                '✅ Git Commit Link enabled! Your commits will now include AI conversation links.'\n            );\n        } else {\n            // Stop session tracking\n            this.stopSessionTracking();\n            \n            // Optionally uninstall hooks (ask user)\n            if (this.installedRepos.size > 0) {\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                    'Git Commit Link disabled. Remove installed hooks from repositories?',\n                    'Remove Hooks',\n                    'Keep Hooks'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Remove Hooks') {\n                        this.uninstallAllHooks();\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Check if user is logged in\n     */\n    private checkLogin(): boolean {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager;\n        return cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() ?? false;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Disable the feature in settings\n     */\n    private async disableFeature(): Promise<void> {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        await config.update('gitCommit.linkEnabled', false, vscode.ConfigurationTarget.Global);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Install hooks for all open workspace folders\n     */\n    private async installHooksForWorkspaces(): Promise<void> {\n        const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;\n        if (!workspaceFolders) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        let successCount = 0;\n        let failureCount = 0;\n        const failures: string[] = [];\n        \n        for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {\n            const repoPath = folder.uri.fsPath;\n            \n            // Check if it's a git repository\n            if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(repoPath, '.git'))) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            const result = await installHook(repoPath);\n            \n            if (result.success) {\n                this.installedRepos.add(repoPath);\n                successCount++;\n            } else {\n                failureCount++;\n                failures.push(`${path.basename(repoPath)}: ${result.message}`);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if (failureCount > 0) {\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                `Hook installation: ${successCount} success, ${failureCount} failed. ${failures.join('; ')}`\n            );\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Uninstall hooks from all tracked repositories\n     */\n    private uninstallAllHooks(): void {\n        for (const repoPath of this.installedRepos) {\n            uninstallHook(repoPath);\n            clearSessionInfo(repoPath);\n        }\n        this.installedRepos.clear();\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Start tracking session for commit linking\n     */\n    private startSessionTracking(): void {\n        // Update session file periodically to keep it fresh\n        this.sessionUpdateInterval = setInterval(() => {\n            if (this.currentSessionId && this.currentWorkspacePath) {\n                writeSessionInfo(this.currentSessionId, this.currentWorkspacePath);\n            }\n        }, 60000); // Update every minute\n        \n        // Initial write if session exists\n        if (this.currentSessionId && this.currentWorkspacePath) {\n            writeSessionInfo(this.currentSessionId, this.currentWorkspacePath);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Stop session tracking\n     */\n    private stopSessionTracking(): void {\n        if (this.sessionUpdateInterval) {\n            clearInterval(this.sessionUpdateInterval);\n            this.sessionUpdateInterval = undefined;\n        }\n        // Clear session files for all tracked repos\n        for (const repoPath of this.installedRepos) {\n            clearSessionInfo(repoPath);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Update current session (called when chat session changes)\n     */\n    setCurrentSession(sessionId: string | undefined, workspacePath: string | undefined): void {\n        // If workspace changed and had a session, clear the old one\n        if (this.currentWorkspacePath && this.currentWorkspacePath !== workspacePath) {\n            clearSessionInfo(this.currentWorkspacePath);\n        }\n        \n        this.currentSessionId = sessionId;\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = workspacePath;\n        \n        if (isGitCommitLinkEnabled() && sessionId && workspacePath) {\n            writeSessionInfo(sessionId, workspacePath);\n            console.log('[GitCommitLinkManager] Session updated:', sessionId, 'for workspace:', workspacePath);\n        } else if (!sessionId && workspacePath) {\n            clearSessionInfo(workspacePath);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Get current session ID\n     */\n    getCurrentSessionId(): string | undefined {\n        return this.currentSessionId;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Install hook for a specific repository (called when new repo is opened)\n     */\n    async installHookForRepo(repoPath: string): Promise<void> {\n        if (!isGitCommitLinkEnabled()) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        if (!this.checkLogin()) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        const result = await installHook(repoPath);\n        if (result.success) {\n            this.installedRepos.add(repoPath);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * Dispose resources\n     */\n    dispose(): void {\n        this.stopSessionTracking();\n        \n        for (const disposable of this.disposables) {\n            disposable.dispose();\n        }\n        this.disposables = [];\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport { URL } from 'url';\nimport { GitWatcher, GitEvent } from './git-watcher';\nimport { GitCommitLinkManager, isGitCommitLinkEnabled } from './git-commit-link';\n\nexport interface GitHubLink {\n    id: string;\n    sessionId: string;\n    linkType: 'commit' | 'pull_request' | 'issue' | 'branch';\n    repoFullName: string;\n    githubNumber?: number;\n    githubSha?: string;\n    githubRef?: string;\n    githubUrl?: string;\n    title?: string;\n    state?: string;\n    author?: string;\n    linkMethod: 'auto' | 'manual';\n    confidence?: number;\n    additions?: number;\n    deletions?: number;\n    changedFilesCount?: number;\n    linkedAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface LinkSuggestion {\n    type: 'commit' | 'pull_request' | 'issue';\n    confidence: number;\n    data: Record<string, any>;\n    reason: string;\n}\n\nexport interface GitHubLinkStats {\n    totalCommits: number;\n    totalPRs: number;\n    totalIssues: number;\n    additions: number;\n    deletions: number;\n    filesChanged: number;\n}\n\nexport class GitHubLinkManager implements vscode.Disposable {\n    private gitWatcher: GitWatcher;\n    private commitLinkManager: GitCommitLinkManager;\n    private disposables: vscode.Disposable[] = [];\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://llm-chat-history.com';\n\n    constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n        // Initialize Git Watcher with callback\n        this.gitWatcher = new GitWatcher({\n            onGitEvent: (event) => this.handleGitEvent(event)\n        });\n        \n        // Initialize Git Commit Link Manager\n        this.commitLinkManager = new GitCommitLinkManager(context);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Initialize the manager\n     */\n    async init(): Promise<boolean> {\n        const success = await this.gitWatcher.init();\n        if (success) {\n            this.disposables.push(this.gitWatcher);\n            console.log('[GitHubLinkManager] Initialized successfully');\n            \n            // Install hooks for newly opened repositories\n            this.gitWatcher.onNewRepository((repoPath: string) => {\n                this.commitLinkManager.installHookForRepo(repoPath);\n            });\n        }\n        \n        // Initialize commit link manager (independent of git watcher)\n        await this.commitLinkManager.init();\n        this.disposables.push(this.commitLinkManager);\n        \n        return success;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle incoming git events\n     */\n    private async handleGitEvent(event: GitEvent): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[GitHubLinkManager] Received git event:', event.eventType, event.commitSha?.substring(0, 7));\n\n        // Get current session from watcher\n        const sessionId = this.gitWatcher.getCurrentSessionId();\n\n        // Only report to cloud if logged in\n        if (this.isLoggedIn()) {\n            try {\n                await this.reportGitEvent(event, sessionId);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('[GitHubLinkManager] Failed to report git event:', error);\n            }\n        } else {\n            console.log('[GitHubLinkManager] Not logged in, skipping cloud report');\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Report a git event to the backend\n     */\n    private async reportGitEvent(event: GitEvent, sessionId?: string): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const body = {\n            session_id: sessionId,\n            event_type: event.eventType,\n            repo_path: event.repoPath,\n            repo_name: event.repoName,\n            branch_name: event.branchName,\n            commit_sha: event.commitSha,\n            commit_message: event.commitMessage,\n            commit_author: event.commitAuthor,\n            commit_time: event.commitTime,\n            files_changed: event.filesChanged,\n            insertions: event.insertions,\n            deletions: event.deletions,\n            changed_files: event.changedFiles,\n            remote_url: event.remoteUrl,\n            remote_name: event.remoteName\n        };\n\n        try {\n            const result = await this.request<{ event: any; auto_link?: GitHubLink }>(\n                'POST',\n                '/api/git/events',\n                body,\n                token\n            );\n\n            if (result.auto_link) {\n                console.log('[GitHubLinkManager] Auto-linked commit to session:', result.auto_link.id);\n                \n                // Show notification for auto-link\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                    `🔗 Commit linked to conversation`,\n                    'View Dashboard'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Dashboard') {\n                        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n                        vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(`${serverUrl}/dashboard`));\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[GitHubLinkManager] Failed to report git event:', error);\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Manually create a GitHub link\n     */\n    async createLink(params: {\n        sessionId: string;\n        messageId?: string;\n        linkType: 'commit' | 'pull_request' | 'issue' | 'branch';\n        repoFullName: string;\n        githubNumber?: number;\n        githubSha?: string;\n        githubRef?: string;\n    }): Promise<GitHubLink> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        const result = await this.request<{ link: GitHubLink }>(\n            'POST',\n            '/api/github/links',\n            {\n                session_id: params.sessionId,\n                message_id: params.messageId,\n                link_type: params.linkType,\n                repo_full_name: params.repoFullName,\n                github_number: params.githubNumber,\n                github_sha: params.githubSha,\n                github_ref: params.githubRef\n            },\n            token\n        );\n\n        return result.link;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get link suggestions for a session\n     */\n    async getSuggestions(sessionId: string): Promise<LinkSuggestion[]> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return [];\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const result = await this.request<{ suggestions: LinkSuggestion[] }>(\n                'GET',\n                `/api/github/links/suggestions?session_id=${sessionId}`,\n                undefined,\n                token\n            );\n            return result.suggestions || [];\n        } catch {\n            return [];\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get links for a session\n     */\n    async getLinksForSession(sessionId: string): Promise<GitHubLink[]> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return [];\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const result = await this.request<{ links: GitHubLink[] }>(\n                'GET',\n                `/api/github/links?session_id=${sessionId}`,\n                undefined,\n                token\n            );\n            return result.links || [];\n        } catch {\n            return [];\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get stats for a session\n     */\n    async getStatsForSession(sessionId: string): Promise<GitHubLinkStats | null> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const result = await this.request<{ stats: GitHubLinkStats }>(\n                'GET',\n                `/api/github/links/stats?session_id=${sessionId}`,\n                undefined,\n                token\n            );\n            return result.stats;\n        } catch {\n            return null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Delete a link\n     */\n    async deleteLink(linkId: string): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>(\n            'DELETE',\n            `/api/github/links/${linkId}`,\n            undefined,\n            token\n        );\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Set the current active session for auto-linking\n     */\n    setCurrentSession(sessionId?: string, workspacePath?: string): void {\n        this.gitWatcher.setCurrentSession(sessionId);\n        \n        // Also update commit link manager for hook-based linking\n        this.commitLinkManager.setCurrentSession(sessionId, workspacePath);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get current session ID\n     */\n    getCurrentSessionId(): string | undefined {\n        return this.gitWatcher.getCurrentSessionId();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if git watcher is ready\n     */\n    isGitWatcherReady(): boolean {\n        return this.gitWatcher.isReady();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get watched repos count\n     */\n    getWatchedReposCount(): number {\n        return this.gitWatcher.getWatchedReposCount();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if user is logged in\n     */\n    private isLoggedIn(): boolean {\n        return !!this.getToken();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get auth token from cloud sync manager\n     */\n    private getToken(): string | undefined {\n        // Access the global cloud sync manager\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager;\n        return cloudSync?.getToken();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get server URL\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        \n        if (debugMode) {\n            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n            if (debugUrl) {\n                return debugUrl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return GitHubLinkManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Make HTTP request\n     */\n    private async request<T>(\n        method: string,\n        path: string,\n        body?: any,\n        token?: string\n    ): Promise<T> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        const url = new URL(path, serverUrl);\n        const isHttps = url.protocol === 'https:';\n        const httpModule = isHttps ? https : http;\n\n        const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        };\n\n        if (token) {\n            headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        }\n\n        const requestBody = body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined;\n\n        return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {\n            const req = httpModule.request(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', () => {\n                        try {\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Dispose resources\n     */\n    dispose(): void {\n        for (const disposable of this.disposables) {\n            disposable.dispose();\n        }\n        this.disposables = [];\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "export class ClineReader {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\n     */\n    private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\n\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\n        let tokensIn = 0;\n        let tokensOut = 0;\n        let totalCost = 0;\n\n        if (uiMessages.messages) {\n            for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\n                if (msg.metrics?.tokens) {\n                    tokensIn += msg.metrics.tokens.prompt || 0;\n                    tokensOut += msg.metrics.tokens.completion || 0;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: ts,\n            task: taskName,\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\n            totalCost: totalCost\n        };\n    }",
        "originalContents": "\n    \n    /**\n     * 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\n     */\n    private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\n\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\n        let tokensIn = 0;\n        let tokensOut = 0;\n        let totalCost = 0;\n\n        if (uiMessages.messages) {\n            for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\n                if (msg.metrics?.tokens) {\n                    tokensIn += msg.metrics.tokens.prompt || 0;\n                    tokensOut += msg.metrics.tokens.completion || 0;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: ts,\n            task: taskName,\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\n            totalCost: totalCost\n        };\n    }",

        "contents": "export class ClineMarkdownGenerator {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(task: ClineTask, messages: ClineMessage[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString());\n        \n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        \n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Token 使用**: 输入 ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, 输出 ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**总费用**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**任务ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Tokens**: In ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, Out ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**Total Cost**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**Task ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        }\n    }",

        "contents": "export class ClineConversationBuilder {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    /**\n     * 增强消息内容处理，支持cline特有的格式\n     */\n    private enhanceMessageContent(message: ClineMessage, apiMsg: any, uiMsg?: any): ClineMessage {\n        // 如果UI消息包含额外信息，添加到消息中\n        if (uiMsg) {\n            // 添加模型信息\n            if (uiMsg.modelInfo) {\n                message.text += `\\n\\n🤖 模型: ${uiMsg.modelInfo.modelId}`;\n            }\n\n            // 添加token使用信息\n            if (uiMsg.metrics?.tokens) {\n                const tokens = uiMsg.metrics.tokens;\n                message.text += `\\n📊 Token: 输入 ${tokens.prompt || 0}, 输出 ${tokens.completion || 0}`;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return message;\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "\n\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any, t: Translator): string {\n    switch (name) {\n        case 'grep':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.grep', {\n                pattern: args?.pattern ?? '',\n                path: args?.path ?? '',\n                matches: result?.matches ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'list_dir':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.list_dir', {\n                dir: args?.target_directory ?? '',\n                count: result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'read_file':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.read_file', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\n        case 'web_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.web_search', {\n                query: args?.query ?? '',\n                count: (result?.results?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'codebase_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.codebase_search', { query: args?.query ?? '' });\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.run_terminal_cmd', { command: args?.command ?? '' });\n        case 'glob_file_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.glob_file_search', {\n                pattern: args?.glob_pattern ?? '',\n                count: (result?.files?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'write':\n            return args?.target_file ? t('toolUse.summary.write', { file: args.target_file }) : '';\n        case 'search_replace':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.search_replace', { file: args?.target_file ??         "contents": "private generateHeader(task: ClineTask): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        const source = locale === 'zh' ? 'Cline 任务' : 'Cline Task';\n        \n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${source}: ${task.id} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: task.id,\n    date: this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString())\n})} -->`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(task: ClineTask, messages: ClineMessage[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString());\n        \n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        \n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Token 使用**: 输入 ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, 输出 ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**总费用**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**任务ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Tokens**: In ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, Out ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**Total Cost**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**Task ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        }\n    ",
        "originalContents": "private generateHeader(task: ClineTask): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        const source = locale === 'zh' ? 'Cline 任务' : 'Cline Task';\n        \n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${source}: ${task.id} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: task.id,\n    date: this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString())\n})} -->`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(task: ClineTask, messages: ClineMessage[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString());\n        \n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        \n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Token 使用**: 输入 ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, 输出 ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**总费用**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**任务ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Tokens**: In ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, Out ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \n**Total Cost**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \n**Task ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\n        }\n    ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".llm-chat-history/history/2025-12-26_04-09Z-分析下cline的聊天记录和cursor的有什么区别？.md",
        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1461,
            "column": 8
          }
        },
        "contents": "private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\n\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\n        let tokensIn = 0;\n        let tokensOut = 0;\n        let totalCost = 0;\n\n        if (uiMessages.messages) {\n            for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\n                if (msg.metrics?.tokens) {\n                    tokensIn += msg.metrics.tokens.prompt || 0;\n                    tokensOut += msg.metrics.tokens.completion || 0;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: ts,\n            task: taskName,\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\n            totalCost: totalCost\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 创建默认元数据\n     */\n    private createDefaultMetadata(taskId: string): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: Date.now(),\n            task: 'Untitled Task',\n            tokensIn: 0,\n            tokensOut: 0,\n            totalCost: 0\n        };\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 解析cline数据文件（支持直接数组和包装对象格式）\n     */\n    ",
        "originalContents": "private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\n\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\n        let tokensIn = 0;\n        let tokensOut = 0;\n        let totalCost = 0;\n\n        if (uiMessages.messages) {\n            for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\n                if (msg.metrics?.tokens) {\n                    tokensIn += msg.metrics.tokens.prompt || 0;\n                    tokensOut += msg.metrics.tokens.completion || 0;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: ts,\n            task: taskName,\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\n            totalCost: totalCost\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 创建默认元数据\n     */\n    private createDefaultMetadata(taskId: string): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: Date.now(),\n            task: 'Untitled Task',\n            tokensIn: 0,\n            tokensOut: 0,\n            totalCost: 0\n        };\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 解析cline数据文件（支持直接数组和包装对象格式）\n     */\n    ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-reader.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 6,
            "column": 48
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 243,

        },
        "contents": "export class BlackboxReader {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            const parts: string[] = [];\n            \n            for (const item of content) {\n                if (!item) continue;\n                \n                // 处理 text 类型\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（思考过程）\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}",
        "originalContents": "\n\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            const parts: string[] = [];\n            \n            for (const item of content) {\n                if (!item) continue;\n                \n                // 处理 text 类型\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（思考过程）\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export class KiloReader {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            const parts: string[] = [];\n            \n            for (const item of content) {\n                if (!item) continue;\n                \n                // 处理 text 类型\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（Kilo/Cline 的思考过程）\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\n                    // tool_result 内容可能很长，只取摘要\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}",
        "originalContents": "\n\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            const parts: string[] = [];\n            \n            for (const item of content) {\n                if (!item) continue;\n                \n                // 处理 text 类型\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（Kilo/Cline 的思考过程）\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\n                    // tool_result 内容可能很长，只取摘要\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}",

        },
        "contents": "{\n  \"references\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Web Search Results\",\n      \"chunk\": \"您好，针对您提出的四个问题，经过查阅相关资料，现总结如下：\\n\\n1. **Rules 文件格式**：建议使用 `.mdc` 扩展名，这是 Cursor 官方推荐的格式，有助于确保规则文件的兼容性和标准化。\\n\\n2. **LM API 可用性**：目前，Cursor 并未明确支持 `vscode.lm` API。因此，采用手动复制 Prompt 的方式是可行的替代方案。\\n\\n3. **文件选择方式**：建议让用户自行选择要分析的历史文件，并在选择时标明每个文件的大致 Token 数量。可以通过统计文件的字符数来估算 Token 数量，具体方法如下：\\n\\n   - **字符数统计**：计算文件中的总字符数。\\n\\n   - **Token 估算**：一般情况下，1 个 Token 大约对应 4 个字符。因此，可以使用以下公式进行估算：\\n\\n     ```\\n     Token 数量 ≈ 字符数 / 4\\n     ```\\n\\n   例如，一个包含 1,000 个字符的文件，大约包含 250 个 Token。\\n\\n4. **Rules 合并策略**：建议将多个历史文件合并生成一个综合的 Rules 文件。这样可以集中管理规则，方便后续的维护和使用。\\n\\n综上所述，建议采用 `.mdc` 格式的 Rules 文件，手动复制 Prompt，用户选择并标明 Token 数量的历史文件，并将多个文件合并生成一个 Rules 文件。如果您对该方案没有异议，我们可以开始进行代码实现。 \"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"isFinal\": true\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n</details>\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #32 (Agent)\n\n_2025-12-30 12:37Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> 搜索结果没有给出具体的参考资料。让我用更精确的关键词搜索。\n\n</details>\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #33 (Agent)\n\n_2025-12-30 12:37Z_\n\n让我使用更精确的关键词搜索 Cursor 的 API 支持情况：\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #34 (Agent)\n\n_2025-12-30 12:37Z_\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (1)\n\n<details>\n",

        "contents": "export class ChatHistorySearcher {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    /**\n     * 在单个文件中搜索\n     */\n    private async searchInFile(filePath: string, query: string): Promise<SearchResult | null> {\n        const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');\n        const lines = content.split('\\n');\n\n        // 解析文件元数据\n        const metadata = this.parseMetadata(lines);\n        if (!metadata) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        // 搜索匹配的行\n        const matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'] = [];\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\n\n        lines.forEach((line, index) => {\n            const lineLower = line.toLowerCase();\n            if (lineLower.includes(queryLower)) {\n                const type = this.determineLineType(line, index, lines);\n                const context = this.getContext(lines, index);\n\n                matchedLines.push({\n                    lineNumber: index + 1,\n                    content: line.trim(),\n                    context: context,\n                    type: type\n                });\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (matchedLines.length === 0) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        // 计算相关性得分\n        const relevanceScore = this.calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines, query);\n\n        return {\n            filePath,\n            fileName: path.basename(filePath),\n            title: metadata.title,\n            createdDate: metadata.createdDate,\n            messageCount: metadata.messageCount,\n            sessionId: metadata.sessionId,\n            matchedLines,\n            relevanceScore\n        };\n    }",

        "contents": "export class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n    ...\n    private async request<T>(\n        method: string,\n        path: string,\n        body?: any,\n        token?: string\n    ): Promise<T> {\n...\n(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', async () => {\n                        try {\n                            // 检查是否有新 token（滑动过期机制）\n                            const newToken = res.headers['x-new-token'];\n                            if (newToken && typeof newToken === 'string') {\n                                console.log('[CloudSync] Token refreshed by server (sliding expiration)');\n                                // 更新存储的 token\n                                await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, newToken);\n                            }\n\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "export class ChatHistorySearcher {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    /**\n     * 计算相关性得分\n     */\n    private calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'], query: string): number {\n        let score = 0;\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\n\n        for (const match of matchedLines) {\n            // 标题匹配权重更高\n            if (match.type === 'title') {\n                score += 10;\n            }\n            // 用户和助手消息权重中等\n            else if (match.type === 'user' || match.type === 'assistant') {\n                score += 5;\n            }\n            // 其他类型权重较低\n            else {\n                score += 1;\n            }\n\n            // 精确匹配权重更高\n            if (match.content.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)) {\n                score += 2;\n            }\n\n            // 多个匹配增加得分\n            score += matchedLines.length * 0.1;\n        }\n\n        return score;\n    }\n}",
        "originalContents": "\n\n    /**\n     * 计算相关性得分\n     */\n    private calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'], query: string): number {\n        let score = 0;\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\n\n        for (const match of matchedLines) {\n            // 标题匹配权重更高\n            if (match.type === 'title') {\n                score += 10;\n            }\n            // 用户和助手消息权重中等\n            else if (match.type === 'user' || match.type === 'assistant') {\n                score += 5;\n            }\n            // 其他类型权重较低\n            else {\n                score += 1;\n            }\n\n            // 精确匹配权重更高\n            if (match.content.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)) {\n                score += 2;\n            }\n\n            // 多个匹配增加得分\n            score += matchedLines.length * 0.1;\n        }\n\n        return score;\n    }\n}",

crypto from 'crypto';\nimport { URL } from 'url';\n\n/**\n * 事件名称常量\n */\nexport const TelemetryEvents = {\n    // ===== 插件生命周期 =====\n    EXTENSION_INSTALLED: 'extension_installed',\n    EXTENSION_ACTIVATED: 'extension_activated',\n    EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED: 'extension_deactivated',\n    \n    // ===== 云同步设置 =====\n    CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED: 'cloud_sync_enabled',\n    CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED: 'cloud_sync_disabled',\n    \n    // ===== 用户认证 =====\n    USER_LOGGED_IN: 'user_logged_in',\n    USER_LOGGED_OUT: 'user_logged_out',\n    \n    // ===== 本地保存 =====\n    FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY: 'file_saved_locally',\n    \n    // ===== 云端同步操作 =====\n    CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED: 'cloud_sync_started',\n    CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED: 'cloud_sync_completed',\n    CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED: 'cloud_sync_failed',\n    \n    // ===== Watcher 生命周期 =====\n    WATCHER_STARTED: 'watcher_started',\n    WATCHER_STOPPED: 'watcher_stopped',\n    \n    // ===== 搜索功能 =====\n    SEARCH_PERFORMED: ERROR_OCCURRED: 'error_occurred',\n} as const;\n\nexport type TelemetryEventName = typeof TelemetryEvents[keyof typeof TelemetryEvents];\n\n/**\n * 单个事件数据\n */\nexport interface TelemetryEvent {\n    event_name: TelemetryEventName;\n    event_data?: Record<string, any>;\n    client_timestamp: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * 遥测上下文（设备和环境信息）\n */\nexport interface TelemetryContext {\n    anonymous_id: string;\n    user_id?: string;\n    extension_version: string;\n    vscode_version: string;\n    os_platform: string;\n    os_version: string;\n    machine_id: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * 遥测管理器\n * 单例模式，负责事件收集和上报\n */\nexport class TelemetryManager {\n    private static instance: TelemetryManager | null = null;\n    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext;\n    private telemetryContext: TelemetryContext | null = null;\n    private eventQueue: TelemetryEvent[] = [];\n    private flushTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private isInitialized: boolean = false;\n\n    // 存储 key 常量\n    private static readonly ANONYMOUS_ID_KEY = 'telemetry.anonymousId';\n    private static readonly FIRST_INSTALL_KEY = 'telemetry.firstInstallTime';\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://llm-chat-history.com';\n    private static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'cloudSync.token';\n\n    // 配置\n    private static readonly FLUSH_INTERVAL = 30000; // 30秒自动刷新\n    private static readonly MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 50; // 最大队列大小\n\n    private constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n        this.context = context;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取单例实例\n     */\n    static getInstance(context?: vscode.ExtensionContext): TelemetryManager {\n        if (!TelemetryManager.instance) {\n            if (!context) {\n                throw new Error('TelemetryManager must be initialized with context first');\n            }\n            TelemetryManager.instance = new TelemetryManager(context);\n        }\n        return TelemetryManager.instance;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 初始化遥测管理器\n     */\n    async initialize(): Promise<void> {\n        if (this.isInitialized) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // 获取或生成匿名 ID\n            let anonymousId = this.context.globalState.get<string>(TelemetryManager.ANONYMOUS_ID_KEY);\n            if (!anonymousId) {\n                anonymousId = this.generateAnonymousId();\n                await this.context.globalState.update(TelemetryManager.ANONYMOUS_ID_KEY, anonymousId);\n                console.log('[Telemetry] Generated new anonymous ID');\n            }\n\n            // 获取插件版本\n            const packageJson = require('../../package.json');\n\n            // 构建遥测上下文\n            this.telemetryContext = {\n                anonymous_id: anonymousId,\n                extension_version: packageJson.version || 'unknown',\n                vscode_version: vscode.version,\n                os_platform: process.platform,\n                os_version: os.release(),\n                machine_id: vscode.env.machineId,\n            };\n\n            // 启动定时刷新\n            this.startFlushTimer();\n\n            this.isInitialized = true;\n            console.log('[Telemetry] Initialized successfully');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to initialize:', error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成匿名 ID\n     */\n    private generateAnonymousId(): string {\n        return crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 检查是否是首次安装\n     */\n    async checkFirstInstall(): Promise<boolean> {\n        const firstInstallTime = this.context.globalState.get<number>(TelemetryManager.FIRST_INSTALL_KEY);\n        if (!firstInstallTime) {\n            await this.context.globalState.update(TelemetryManager.FIRST_INSTALL_KEY, Date.now());\n            return true;\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 设置用户 ID（登录后调用）\n     */\n    setUserId(userId: string | undefined): void {\n        if (this.telemetryContext) {\n            this.telemetryContext.user_id = userId;\n            console.log('[Telemetry] User ID set:', userId ? 'logged in' : 'logged out');\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 从已有的 CloudSyncManager 获取用户 ID\n     */\n    getUserIdFromCloudSync(): string | undefined {\n        const user = this.context.globalState.get<{ id: string }>('cloudSync.user');\n        return user?.id;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 从已有的 CloudSyncManager 获取 token\n     */\n    private getTokenFromCloudSync(): string | undefined {\n        return this.context.globalState.get<string>(TelemetryManager.TOKEN_KEY);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 上报事件\n     */\n    async trackEvent(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): Promise<void> {\n        if (!this.isInitialized || !this.telemetryContext) {\n            console.warn('[Telemetry] Not initialized, event queued:', eventName);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 检查是否启用遥测\n        if (!this.isEnabled()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const event: TelemetryEvent = {\n            event_name: eventName,\n            event_data: eventData,\n            client_timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n        };\n\n        // 添加到队列\n        this.eventQueue.push(event);\n        console.log('[Telemetry] Event queued:', eventName);\n\n        // 如果队列满了，立即发送\n        if (this.eventQueue.length >= TelemetryManager.MAX_QUEUE_SIZE) {\n            await this.flush();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即上报事件（不进入队列）\n     */\n    async trackEventImmediately(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): Promise<void> {\n        if (!this.isInitialized || !this.telemetryContext) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (!this.isEnabled()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 更新用户 ID\n        this.telemetryContext.user_id = this.getUserIdFromCloudSync();\n\n        // 获取 token（如果有 user_id，需要 token 来验证身份）\n        const token = this.telemetryContext.user_id ? this.getTokenFromCloudSync() : undefined;\n\n        const payload = {\n            ...this.telemetryContext,\n            event_name: eventName,\n            event_data: eventData,\n            client_timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n        };\n\n        try {\n            await this.request('POST', '/api/telemetry/event', payload, token);\n            console.log('[Telemetry] Event sent immediately:', eventName);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send event:', eventName, error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 刷新队列，发送所有待发送事件\n     */\n    async flush(): Promise<void> {\n        if (this.eventQueue.length === 0 || !this.telemetryContext) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 更新用户 ID\n        this.telemetryContext.user_id = this.getUserIdFromCloudSync();\n\n        // 获取 token（如果有 user_id，需要 token 来验证身份）\n        const token = this.telemetryContext.user_id ? this.getTokenFromCloudSync() : undefined;\n\n        const events = [...this.eventQueue];\n        this.eventQueue = [];\n\n        const payload = {\n            ...this.telemetryContext,\n            events: events.map(e => ({\n                event_name: e.event_name,\n                event_data: e.event_data,\n                client_timestamp: e.client_timestamp,\n            })),\n        };\n\n        try {\n            await this.request('POST', '/api/telemetry/events', payload, token);\n            console.log('[Telemetry] Batch sent:', events.length, 'events');\n        } catch (error) {\n            // 发送失败，重新加入队列\n            this.eventQueue = [...events, ...this.eventQueue].slice(0, TelemetryManager.MAX_QUEUE_SIZE);\n            console.error('[Telemetry] Batch send failed, events re-queued');\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动定时刷新\n     */\n    private startFlushTimer(): void {\n        if (this.flushTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.flushTimer);\n        }\n        this.flushTimer = setInterval(() => {\n            this.flush();\n        }, TelemetryManager.FLUSH_INTERVAL);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止定时刷新\n     */\n    private stopFlushTimer(): void {\n        if (this.flushTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.flushTimer);\n            this.flushTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 检查遥测是否启用\n     */\n    private isEnabled(): boolean {\n        // 检查 VS Code 全局遥测设置\n        const vscodeTelemetry = vscode.env.isTelemetryEnabled;\n        if (!vscodeTelemetry) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        // 检查插件自己的遥测设置（可选，暂未添加配置项）\n        // const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        // return config.get<boolean>('telemetry.enabled', true);\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取服务器 URL\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n\n        if (debugMode) {\n            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n            if (debugUrl) {\n                return debugUrl;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return TelemetryManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 发送 HTTP 请求\n     */\n    private async request<T>(method: string, path: string, body?: any, token?: string): Promise<T> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        const url = new URL(path, serverUrl);\n        const isHttps = url.protocol === 'https:';\n        const httpModule = isHttps ? https : http;\n\n        const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        };\n\n        // 如果有 token，添加 Authorization header\n        if (token) {\n            headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        }\n\n        const requestBody = body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined;\n\n        return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {\n            const req = httpModule.request(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                    timeout: 10000, // 10秒超时\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', () => {\n                        try {\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n            req.on('timeout', () => {\n                req.destroy();\n                reject(new Error('Request timeout'));\n            });\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 销毁管理器\n     */\n    async dispose(): Promise<void> {\n        this.stopFlushTimer();\n        // 发送剩余事件\n        await this.flush();\n        TelemetryManager.instance = null;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：获取遥测管理器实例\n */\nexport function getTelemetry(): TelemetryManager | null {\n    try {\n        return TelemetryManager.getInstance();\n    } catch {\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：上报事件\n */\nexport function trackEvent(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n    const telemetry = getTelemetry();\n    if (telemetry) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(eventName, eventData);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：上报事件（仅登录用户）\n */\nexport function trackEventIfLoggedIn(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n    const telemetry = getTelemetry();\n    if (telemetry && telemetry.getUserIdFromCloudSync()) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(eventName, eventData);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：上报错误\n */\nexport function trackError(errorType: string, errorMessage: string, source?: string): void {\n    const telemetry = getTelemetry();\n    if (telemetry) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.ERROR_OCCURRED, {\n            error_type: errorType,\n            error_message: errorMessage.substring(0, 500), // 限制错误消息长度\n            source: source,\n        });\n    }\n}\n\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #33 (Agent)

_2026-01-06 12:15Z_

已修复！现在 `CHANGELOG.md` 会被包含在 vsix 包中。

**总结：**

| 市场 | 是否自动展示 CHANGELOG |
|------|------------------------|
| **VS Code Marketplace** | ✅ 是，会在扩展详情页显示 "Changelog" 标签页 |
| **Open VSX** | ✅ 是，同样会显示 "Changelog" 标签页 |
| **Cursor 市场** | ✅ 是，与 VS Code 相同 |

**要求：**
1. ✅ 文件名必须是 `CHANGELOG.md`（大写）
2. ✅ 文件位于扩展根目录
3. ✅ 文件不能被 `.vscodeignore` 排除 — **刚修复了这个问题**

之前你的 `.vscodeignore` 中有 `*.md` 规则排除了所有 markdown 文件，只保留了 `README.md` 和 `QUICK_FIX.md`，导致 `CHANGELOG.md` 不会被打包进 vsix。现在已添加 `!CHANGELOG.md` 例外规则，下次打包时会自动包含并在市场展示。
